title: NIO Stock Forecast First Quarterly Profit, Record Deliveries
text: NIO achieved historic first quarterly profit in Q4 2025 with record deliveries 124,807 vehicles. Company achieved RMB 34.7 billion revenue with 75.9% year-over-year growth. Non-GAAP net income reached approximately $104 million marking first profitable quarter. Gross margin reached 17.5% with vehicle margin reaching record levels. Free cash flow remained positive demonstrating improving operational efficiency. Company's path to profitability validates turnaround strategy focused on cost control and premium vehicle sales. Guidance for 2026 includes 40%-50% volume growth targeting deliveries closer to half million vehicles. Three flagship large EVs planned for 2026 expected to maintain higher margin profile supporting profitability targets. Management targets non-GAAP operating profit break-even in fiscal 2026 with potential for sustained profitability in 2027.
